title: sonchus arvensis var. uliginosus
intro: Sonchus arvensis var. uliginosus, also known as common sowthistle, is a variant of the Sonchus arvensis plant, which is a biennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The leaves and roots of Sonchus arvensis var. uliginosus contain medicinal properties, including flavonoids, sesquiterpene lactones, and phenolic acids, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Sonchus arvensis var. uliginosus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or compress to treat skin conditions.
